channel.title: Chicken Scratch & Code - a blog by Michelle Zelechoski
channel.description: Recent content on Chicken Scratch & Code - a blog by Michelle Zelechoski

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Hey, there. I’m Michelle Zelechoski.

I’m an artist, writer, and budding programmer. I’m currently studying Computer Science at Oregon State University and I live in the Greater Seattle Area.

I spend my free time writing code in Python, playing with my dog, and caring for my flock of chickens.

print("Hello, World!")

Thanks for being here!

item.title: Site Under Construction
item.description: This site is under construction, but ultimately it will be a place for me to talk about my coding journey, about my transition from working as a full-time artist to working in tech, and about other things going on in my life (including my chickens).
